creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Update sysutils/ansible to 1.5. This is a major version.
	Changelog: https://raw.github.com/ansible/ansible/v1.5.0/CHANGELOG.md

	Port changes:
	* clarify how to use sysutils/ansible port to control non-FreeBSD systems in pkg-message
	* remove man3 man pages: they are gone in the upsteream distribution
	* convert to PLIST_FILES
	
	Important:
	* this supersedes ports/187175
	* please update UPDATING file: some previously-deprecated syntax has been removed
	Advise that the user reads the changelog:
        - when_foo: use "when" instead
        - only_if: use "when" instead
        - include + with_items: use "with_nested / with_together" instead

How-To-Repeat: 	Apply this patch.
